title: isoetes histrix var. loricata
intro: Isoetes histrix var. loricata, also known as the Rough Quillwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Isoetaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Isoetes histrix var. loricata include its ability to help relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and promote healing in the respiratory tract. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
